title: Anekantavada: The Doctrine of Many-Sidedness
description: The Jain epistemological principle: reality has infinite aspects, and no single perspective captures the whole truth.
introduction: The Jain epistemological principle: reality has infinite aspects, and no single perspective captures the whole truth.

translation.text: Reality is complex. What is true from one standpoint may be false from another. The wise person sees all sides.
